name: Graphs
javadoc:
/**
 * A collection of utilities to assist with graph manipulation.
 *
 * @author Barak Naveh
 * @since Jul 31, 2003
 */

members.name: addEdge
members.javadoc: /** * Creates a new edge and adds it to the specified graph similarly to the * {@link Graph#addEdge(Object, Object)} method. * * @param g the graph for which the edge to be added. * @param sourceVertex source vertex of the edge. * @param targetVertex target vertex of the edge. * @param weight weight of the edge. * * @return The newly created edge if added to the graph, otherwise * null. * * @see Graph#addEdge(Object, Object) */

tags.name: g
tags.content: the graph for which the edge to be added.
tags.assertion: assert receiverObjectID.addEdge(null, args[0], null, null) != null;
tags.description: g must be a Graph

tags.name: sourceVertex
tags.content: source vertex of the edge.
tags.assertion: assert receiverObjectID.addEdge(null, args[0], null, null) != null;
tags.description: sourceVertex must be an Object

tags.name: targetVertex
tags.content: target vertex of the edge.
tags.assertion: assert receiverObjectID.addEdge(null, args[0], null, null) != null;
tags.description: targetVertex must be an Object

tags.name: weight
tags.content: weight of the edge.
tags.assertion: assert receiverObjectID.addEdge(null, args[0], null, args[3]) != null;
tags.description: weight must be a double

tags.name: The
tags.content: newly created edge if added to the graph, otherwise null.
tags.description: newly created edge if added to the graph, otherwise null.

tags.name: Graph#addEdge(Object,
tags.content: Object)

members.name: addEdgeWithVertices
members.javadoc: /** * Adds the specified source and target vertices to the graph, if not * already included, and creates a new edge and adds it to the specified * graph similarly to the {@link Graph#addEdge(Object, Object)} method. * * @param g the graph for which the specified edge to be added. * @param sourceVertex source vertex of the edge. * @param targetVertex target vertex of the edge. * * @return The newly created edge if added to the graph, otherwise * null. */

tags.name: g
tags.content: the graph for which the specified edge to be added.
tags.description: g must be a graph

tags.name: sourceVertex
tags.content: source vertex of the edge.
tags.description: sourceVertex must not be null and must be an object

tags.name: targetVertex
tags.content: target vertex of the edge.
tags.description: targetVertex must not be null and must be an object

tags.name: The
tags.content: newly created edge if added to the graph, otherwise null.

members.name: addEdgeWithVertices
members.javadoc:
/**
 * Adds the specified edge to the graph, including its vertices if not
 * already included.
 *
 * @param targetGraph the graph for which the specified edge to be added.
 * @param sourceGraph the graph in which the specified edge is already
 * present
 * @param edge edge to add
 *
 * @return <tt>true</tt> if the target graph did not already contain the
 * specified edge.
 */

tags.name: targetGraph
tags.content: the graph for which the specified edge to be added.
tags.description: targetGraph must be a Graph

tags.name: sourceGraph
tags.content: the graph in which the specified edge is already present
tags.description: sourceGraph must be a Graph

tags.name: edge
tags.content: edge to add
tags.description: edge must be an Object

tags.name: <tt>true</tt>
tags.content: if the target graph did not already contain the specified edge.

members.name: addEdgeWithVertices
members.javadoc: /** * Adds the specified source and target vertices to the graph, if not * already included, and creates a new weighted edge and adds it to the * specified graph similarly to the {@link Graph#addEdge(Object, Object)} * method. * * @param g the graph for which the specified edge to be added. * @param sourceVertex source vertex of the edge. * @param targetVertex target vertex of the edge. * @param weight weight of the edge. * * @return The newly created edge if added to the graph, otherwise * null. */

tags.name: g
tags.content: the graph for which the specified edge to be added.
tags.description: the graph must be null

tags.name: sourceVertex
tags.content: source vertex of the edge.
tags.description: source vertex of the edge must not be null

tags.name: targetVertex
tags.content: target vertex of the edge.
tags.description: target vertex of the edge must not be null

tags.name: weight
tags.content: weight of the edge.
tags.description: weight of the edge must not be negative

tags.name: The
tags.content: newly created edge if added to the graph, otherwise null.

members.name: addGraph
members.javadoc:
/** * Adds all the vertices and all the edges of the specified source graph to * the specified destination graph. First all vertices of the source graph * are added to the destination graph. Then every edge of the source graph * is added to the destination graph. This method returns true * if the destination graph has been modified as a result of this operation, * otherwise it returns false. * *

The behavior of this operation is undefined if any of the specified * graphs is modified while operation is in progress.

* * @param destination the graph to which vertices and edges are added. * @param source the graph used as source for vertices and edges to add. * * @return true if and only if the destination graph has been * changed as a result of this operation. */

tags.name: destination
tags.content: the graph to which vertices and edges are added.
tags.description: the graph to which vertices and edges are added.

tags.name: source
tags.content: the graph used as source for vertices and edges to add.
tags.description: the graph used as source for vertices and edges to add.

tags.name: true
tags.content: if and only if the destination graph has been changed as a result of this operation.

members.code:
/** * Adds all the vertices and all the edges of the specified source graph to * the specified destination graph. First all vertices of the source graph * are added to the destination graph. Then every edge of the source graph * is added to the destination graph. This method returns true * if the destination graph has been modified as a result of this operation, * otherwise it returns false. * *

The behavior of this operation is undefined if any of the specified * graphs is modified while operation is in progress.

* * @param destination the graph to which vertices and edges are added. * @param source the graph used as source for vertices and edges to add. * * @return true if and only if the destination graph has been * changed as a result of this operation. */ public static boolean addGraph(Graph destination, Graph source) { boolean modified = addAllVertices(destination, source.vertexSet()); modified |= addAllEdges(destination, source, source.edgeSet()); return modified; }

members.name: addGraphReversed
members.javadoc:
/** * Adds all the vertices and all the edges of the specified source digraph * to the specified destination digraph, reversing all of the edges. If you * want to do this as a linked view of the source graph (rather than by * copying to a destination graph), use {@link EdgeReversedGraph} instead. * *

The behavior of this operation is undefined if any of the specified * graphs is modified while operation is in progress.

* * @param destination the graph to which vertices and edges are added. * @param source the graph used as source for vertices and edges to add. * * @see EdgeReversedGraph */

tags.name: destination
tags.content: the graph to which vertices and edges are added.
tags.description: the graph to which vertices and edges are added must be null

tags.name: source
tags.content: the graph used as source for vertices and edges to add.
tags.description: the source graph used as source for vertices and edges to add must be null

members.name: addAllEdges
members.javadoc:
/**
 * Adds a subset of the edges of the specified source graph to the specified
 * destination graph. The behavior of this operation is undefined if either
 * of the graphs is modified while the operation is in progress. {@link
 * #addEdgeWithVertices} is used for the transfer, so source vertexes will
 * be added automatically to the target graph.
 *
 * @param destination the graph to which edges are to be added
 * @param source the graph used as a source for edges to add
 * @param edges the edges to be added
 *
 * @return <tt>true</tt> if this graph changed as a result of the call
 */

tags.name: destination
tags.content: the graph to which edges are to be added
tags.description: the behavior of this operation is undefined if either graph is modified while the operation is in progress

tags.name: source
tags.content: the graph used as a source for edges to add
tags.description: the behavior of this operation is undefined if either graph is modified while the operation is in progress

tags.name: edges
tags.content: the edges to be added
tags.description: the behavior of this operation is undefined if either graph is modified while the operation is in progress

tags.name: <tt>true</tt>
tags.content: if this graph changed as a result of the call

members.name: addAllVertices
members.javadoc:
/**
 * Adds all of the specified vertices to the destination graph. The behavior
 * of this operation is undefined if the specified vertex collection is
 * modified while the operation is in progress. This method will invoke the
 * {@link Graph#addVertex(Object)} method.
 *
 * @param destination the graph to which edges are to be added
 * @param vertices the vertices to be added to the graph.
 *
 * @return <tt>true</tt> if graph changed as a result of the call
 *
 * @throws NullPointerException if the specified vertices contains one or
 * more null vertices, or if the specified vertex collection is <tt>
 * null</tt>.
 *
 * @see Graph#addVertex(Object)
 */

tags.name: destination
tags.content: the graph to which edges are to be added

tags.name: vertices
tags.content: the vertices to be added to the graph.

tags.name: <tt>true</tt>
tags.content: if graph changed as a result of the call

tags.name: NullPointerException
tags.content: if the specified vertices contains one or more null vertices, or if the specified vertex collection is <tt> null</tt>.
tags.description: if the specified vertices contains one or more null vertices, or if the specified vertex collection is <tt> null</tt>.

members.name: neighborListOf
members.javadoc:
/**
 * Returns a list of vertices that are the neighbors of a specified vertex.
 * If the graph is a multigraph vertices may appear more than once in the
 * returned list.
 *
 * @param g the graph to look for neighbors in.
 * @param vertex the vertex to get the neighbors of.
 *
 * @return a list of the vertices that are the neighbors of the specified
 * vertex.
 */

tags.name: g
tags.content: the graph to look for neighbors in.
tags.description: g must be a Graph

tags.name: vertex
tags.content: the vertex to get the neighbors of.
tags.description: vertex must be an Object

tags.name: a
tags.content: list of the vertices that are the neighbors of the specified vertex.

members.name: predecessorListOf
members.javadoc:
/**
 * Returns a list of vertices that are the direct predecessors of a
 * specified vertex. If the graph is a multigraph, vertices may appear more
 * than once in the returned list.
 *
 * @param g the graph to look for predecessors in.
 * @param vertex the vertex to get the predecessors of.
 *
 * @return a list of the vertices that are the direct predecessors of the
 * specified vertex.
 */

tags.name: g
tags.content: the graph to look for predecessors in.
tags.description: the graph to look for predecessors in.

tags.name: vertex
tags.content: the vertex to get the predecessors of.
tags.description: the vertex to get the predecessors of.

tags.name: a
tags.content: list of the vertices that are the direct predecessors of the specified vertex.

members.name: successorListOf
members.javadoc:
/**
 * Returns a list of vertices that are the direct successors of a specified
 * vertex. If the graph is a multigraph vertices may appear more than once
 * in the returned list.
 *
 * @param g the graph to look for successors in.
 * @param vertex the vertex to get the successors of.
 *
 * @return a list of the vertices that are the direct successors of the
 * specified vertex.
 */

tags.name: g
tags.content: the graph to look for successors in.
tags.description: g must be a directed graph

tags.name: vertex
tags.content: the vertex to get the successors of.
tags.description: vertex must not be null and must be an object

tags.name: a
tags.content: list of the vertices that are the direct successors of the specified vertex.

members.name: undirectedGraph
members.javadoc:
/**
 * Returns an undirected view of the specified graph. If the specified graph
 * is directed, returns an undirected view of it. If the specified graph is
 * already undirected, just returns it.
 *
 * @param g the graph for which an undirected view is to be returned.
 *
 * @return an undirected view of the specified graph, if it is directed, or
 * or the specified graph itself if it is already undirected.
 *
 * @throws IllegalArgumentException if the graph is neither DirectedGraph
 * nor UndirectedGraph.
 *
 * @see AsUndirectedGraph
 */

tags.name: g
tags.content: the graph for which an undirected view is to be returned.
tags.description: the graph for which an undirected view is to be returned.

tags.name: an
tags.content: undirected view of the specified graph, if it is directed, or or the specified graph itself if it is already undirected.
tags.description: undirected view of the specified graph, if it is directed, or or the specified graph itself if it is already undirected.

tags.name: IllegalArgumentException
tags.content: if the graph is neither DirectedGraph nor UndirectedGraph.
tags.description: if the graph is neither DirectedGraph nor UndirectedGraph.

members.name: testIncidence
members.javadoc:
/**
 * Tests whether an edge is incident to a vertex.
 *
 * @param g graph containing e and v
 * @param e edge in g
 * @param v vertex in g
 *
 * @return true iff e is incident on v
 */

tags.name: g
tags.content: graph containing e and v
tags.description: graph containing e and v must not be null

tags.name: e
tags.content: edge in g
tags.description: edge in g must not be null

tags.name: v
tags.content: vertex in g
tags.description: vertex in g must not be null

tags.name: true
tags.content: iff e is incident on v
tags.description: iff e is incident on v

members.name: getOppositeVertex

/**

 * @param v vertex in g
 *

 */

tags.name: g
tags.content: graph containing e and v
tags.description: g must be a graph

tags.name: e
tags.content: edge in g
tags.description: e must be an edge in g

tags.name: v
tags.content: vertex in g
tags.description: v must be a vertex in g

tags.name: vertex
tags.content: opposite to v across e
